Hi Emma — I found your dentist appointment:

- Title: Dentist Appointment  
- When: 2024-05-18, 09:00–10:00  
- Location: Downtown Dental Clinic  
- Event id: 5

I can reschedule it, but I need a little input:

1. New date/time: please give the new start time in this format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM. (If you don’t give an end time, I’ll keep the same 1‑hour duration; if you want a different end time, give it in the same format.)
2. If you’d rather, tell me a few preferred windows (e.g., “any weekday morning next week” or “May 20–22, afternoons”) and I can suggest specific slots that don’t conflict with other calendar events.
3. Do you want me to notify any participants? (Currently the event only includes your email; if you want the dental clinic notified, provide their email or confirm you want me to send a notification.)

Tell me which option you prefer and the new date/time (or preferred windows), and I’ll reschedule it.
